reference: Do serum thyroid-stimulating hormone and serum prolactin, then do hysterosalpingography on the eighth day. Then do a follicular study after taking clomiphene from day two. When the follicle size increases to eighteen millimeters, it will rupture, and then perform intrauterine insemination for early results.
text: Do serum thyroid stimulating hormone and serum prolactin, then do hysterosalpingography on the eighth day. Then do a follicular study after taking omeprazole on day two. When the follicle size increases to eighteen millimeters, it will rupture, and then perform intrauterine insemination for early result.
